de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Interface PreferenceSaver.Saver<C extends Component>

  • Type Parameters:
    C - the type of Components to store/read.
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    PreferenceSaver.AbstractButtonSaver, PreferenceSaver.SplitPaneSaver, PreferenceSaver.TabbedPaneSaver, PreferenceSaver.WindowSaver
    Enclosing class:
    PreferenceSaver

    private static interface PreferenceSaver.Saver<C extends Component>
    Every Component class has its own Saver class.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void load(C component, Preferences prefs) 
      void save(C component, Preferences prefs)
